auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Jotform API key sent with the APIKEY request header. Create it from Account API > Create New Key: https://www.jotform.com/help/253-how-to-create-jotform-api-key/.

actions.name: create_submission
actions.description: Create a submission on a Jotform form using question IDs and answer values.

formId.description: The Jotform form ID that will receive the submission.

answers.description: The submission answers keyed by Jotform question ID. Values may be scalars, arrays, or nested objects for compound fields.

markAsNew.description: Whether Jotform should mark the submission as new.

flag.description: Whether Jotform should set the submission flag.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for creating a submission on a Jotform form.

submissionId.description: The Jotform submission ID created by the request.

submissionUrl.description: The API URL that can be used to retrieve the created Jotform submission.

outputSchema.description: The normalized submission-create response returned by Jotform.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Get the current Jotform account associated with the authenticated API key.

inputSchema.description: No input parameters are required for this action.

username.description: The Jotform username associated with the API key.

name.description: The full name reported by Jotform.

email.description: The account email address reported by Jotform.

website.description: The website URL stored on the Jotform account.

time_zone.description: The configured IANA time zone for the account.

account_type.description: The Jotform account plan URL or identifier.

status.description: The current account status reported by Jotform.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the account was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the account was last updated.

is_verified.description: Whether the Jotform account is verified.

usage.description: The Jotform usage endpoint URL for the account.

industry.description: The industry configured on the account.

company.description: The company configured on the account.

language.description: The language configured on the account.

avatarUrl.description: The avatar URL reported by Jotform.

items.description: One webhook URL configured on the account.

webhooks.description: The account-level webhooks configured in Jotform.

doNotClone.description: Whether the account disables form cloning.

outputSchema.description: The normalized current-user response returned by Jotform.

actions.name: get_form
actions.description: Get one Jotform form by form ID.

formId.description: The Jotform form ID to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for retrieving one Jotform form.

username.description: The Jotform username that owns the form.

height.description: The configured form height in pixels.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the form was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the form was last updated.

last_submission.description: The timestamp of the most recent form submission.

type.description: The Jotform form type, such as LEGACY or CARD.

favorite.description: Whether the form is marked as a favorite.

url.description: The public URL of the Jotform form.

outputSchema.description: The normalized single-form response returned by Jotform.

actions.name: get_submission
actions.description: Get one Jotform submission by submission ID.

submissionId.description: The Jotform submission ID to retrieve.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for retrieving one Jotform submission.

form_id.description: The Jotform form ID that owns this submission.

ip.description: The submitter IP address reported by Jotform.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the submission was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the submission was last updated.

new.description: Whether the submission is currently marked as new.

text.description: The question label shown on the Jotform form.

type.description: The Jotform question type, such as control_textbox.

answer.description: The raw answer payload returned by Jotform.

prettyFormat.description: The formatted answer string returned by Jotform when available.

additionalProperties.description: One normalized answer entry from a Jotform submission.

answers.description: The answers keyed by Jotform question ID.

workflowStatus.description: The workflow status reported by Jotform when a workflow is attached.

outputSchema.description: The normalized single-submission response returned by Jotform.

actions.name: list_form_questions
actions.description: List the question definitions configured on one Jotform form.

formId.description: The Jotform form ID whose questions should be listed.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for listing the questions on one Jotform form.

type.description: The Jotform question type, such as control_textbox.

text.description: The visible question label on the form.

order.description: The position of the question in the form.

required.description: Whether Jotform marks the question as required.

readonly.description: Whether Jotform marks the question as readonly.

labelAlign.description: The configured label alignment for the question.

hint.description: The question hint text returned by Jotform.

validation.description: The validation mode configured on the question.

additionalProperties.description: The string value returned for this key.

sublabels.description: A string-keyed map returned by Jotform.

questions.description: The normalized questions keyed by Jotform question ID.

outputSchema.description: The normalized question-list response returned by Jotform.

actions.name: list_form_submissions
actions.description: List submissions for one Jotform form.

formId.description: The Jotform form ID whose submissions should be listed.

limit.description: The maximum number of submissions to return.

offset.description: The starting offset for the submissions page.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for listing Jotform submissions on one form.

form_id.description: The Jotform form ID that owns this submission.

ip.description: The submitter IP address reported by Jotform.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the submission was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the submission was last updated.

new.description: Whether the submission is currently marked as new.

text.description: The question label shown on the Jotform form.

type.description: The Jotform question type, such as control_textbox.

answer.description: The raw answer payload returned by Jotform.

prettyFormat.description: The formatted answer string returned by Jotform when available.

additionalProperties.description: One normalized answer entry from a Jotform submission.

answers.description: The answers keyed by Jotform question ID.

workflowStatus.description: The workflow status reported by Jotform when a workflow is attached.

outputSchema.description: The normalized submission-list response returned by Jotform.

actions.name: list_forms
actions.description: List forms available to the authenticated Jotform account.

limit.description: The maximum number of forms to return.

offset.description: The starting offset for the forms page.

search.description: The free-text search query for matching forms.

folder.description: The folder ID used to filter returned forms.

orderby.description: The Jotform form field used for upstream sorting.

sorting.description: The upstream sort direction used when listing forms.

inputSchema.description: Input payload for listing Jotform forms.

username.description: The Jotform username that owns the form.

height.description: The configured form height in pixels.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the form was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the form was last updated.

last_submission.description: The timestamp of the most recent form submission.

type.description: The Jotform form type, such as LEGACY or CARD.

favorite.description: Whether the form is marked as a favorite.

url.description: The public URL of the Jotform form.

offset.description: The starting offset of the returned form page.

limit.description: The maximum number of forms requested.

count.description: The number of forms returned in this page.

resultSet.description: The Jotform pagination metadata returned for form listings.

outputSchema.description: The normalized form-list response returned by Jotform.
